name: Titus
extractionNotes: Every skill (plot, clash, and ultimate) is preceded on the card by a target icon from icons.json skillIcons: skill_self, skill_friendly, skill_area, or skill_enemy. Stored as the skillIcon field.

Skill range / accuracy / damage are stored only in statProfiles. Use figuresInHex "-" when the card shows a single stat row; use 1, 2, or 3 when multiple rows match follower figures in the hex (max 3).
Champion and follower stats always use plotSpeed and clashSpeed (never a single speed field), even when both values are the same.
Follower stats are plotSpeed, clashSpeed, dodge, protection, and health from the stat row on the follower card. Unit count (top-right icon) is stored separately as units.
If card text says "Must target a follower" or "Must target a champion", remove it from text and store as mustTarget (follower, champion, or -).
Icon-only boon effects: skill_self → "Gain {boon_id}", skill_friendly → "Grant {boon_id}". Icon-only blight or "Hit Effect:" blight → "Inflict {blight_id}."

factionTrait.name: Maelstrom Champion
factionTrait.text: A maelstrom moves the turn token +1 step when they knock out an enemy follower.

uniqueTraits.name: Superiority
uniqueTraits.text: Titus has +1 {dodge} against followers' hit rolls and +1 {protection} against followers' damage rolls.

ultimate.name: Path of Destruction
ultimate.text: Titus may make a skill action. Then he may move 1 hex. Then he may make another skill action.

plotSkills.name: Challenge
plotSkills.text: An enemy model within range gains two different blights of your choice. Titus gains a blight of your opponent's choice.

plotSkills.name: I'll Kill You All!
plotSkills.text: Hit Effect: Move all followers in target's unit that are within range up to 1 hex.

clashSkills.name: Piercing Strike
clashSkills.text: This skill may target up to two models in the same hex.

clashSkills.name: Sweeping Slash
clashSkills.text: This skill may target up to two models that are in different hexes.

traits.name: Rapid Deployment
traits.text: After using a recruit action, the Glory Seeker returned to the battlefield moves up to 2 hexes.

plotSkills.name: Roar of Battle
plotSkills.text: One champion within range may move 1 hex.

plotSkills.name: Outflank
plotSkills.text: Hit Effect: Place each Glory Seeker that is adjacent to the target in a hex adjacent to the target.

clashSkills.name: Surround Pound
clashSkills.text: This skill has +1 {accuracy_die} and +1 {damage_die} for each other hex adjacent to the target that contains one or more Glory Seekers.
